meaning: n.热月(法兰西共和历的11月,相当于公历7月19日到8月17日)
examples: C: Lobster Thermidor or Crabmeat Newburg.
Grilled live Boston lobster thermidor (additional 268rmb) with truffle tagliatelle, pearl of vegetables, crustacean foam.
Quoting a Tory peer, he told Mr Ancram his party's policy on opting out of bits of the EU was like going into McDonalds and ordering lobster thermidor.
